description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof, featuring a spacious open-plan layout and a large backyard pool. The front of the house includes a driveway, a garage, and a landscaped entryway with several trees and shrubs. The backyard is dominated by a rectangular swimming pool, a wooden deck, and a small garden area with palm trees. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior living spaces to the outdoor areas. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and wood, with clean lines and minimalistic detailing. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the flat roof, and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a large swimming pool, wooden deck, and garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's depth, additional windows, and the transition from the front to the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway leading to a garage
